name: wheelbuildchart
description: Visualization of spoke tension in bicycle wheel

scripts.test: docker run --rm --network=host --user $(id -u):$(id -g) -e HOME=/tmp -v $PWD:/app -w /app mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.58.2 bash -c 'npm install --no-save --no-package-lock vite@8.0.3; npx vite --port 8000 & npx wait-on http://localhost:8000 && npx playwright test'
scripts.test:update-snapshots: docker run --rm --network=host --user $(id -u):$(id -g) -e HOME=/tmp -v $PWD:/app -w /app mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.58.2 bash -c 'npm install --no-save --no-package-lock vite@8.0.3; npx vite --port 8000 & npx wait-on http://localhost:8000 && npx playwright test --update-snapshots'

author: Konstantin Shemyak
